name: fable-yeon-skill
description: Combined Codex and Claude Code Fable/Mythos evidence gate package.

interface.shortDescription: Opt-in Fable/Mythos evidence gate for Codex and Claude Code.
interface.longDescription: Fable Yeon Skill packages Codex and Claude Code adapters for an opt-in evidence gate that stays off by default, requires an active task and valid lease, blocks implementation edits until SPEC passes, records touched files, and requires live verification evidence before closing.
defaultPrompt: Run this task with the Falbe Yeon hard gate.
Turn on the Fable gate for this high-risk change.
